/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/RemoteJoyLite-cross.dir/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/RemoteJoyLite-cross.dir/macos/RemoteJoyLiteMac.mm.o" -o RemoteJoyLite-cross   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.29/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.29/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/sdl3/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib -lusb-1.0 -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework AVFoundation -framework CoreMedia -framework CoreVideo
